title: Prediction resolver should handle unchampioned newly created scores consistently
description: Newly created split Agent Misrepresentation scores can be predicted individually when targeted directly, but no-cache scorecard loading for the composite path fails because dependent scores have no championVersionId. Investigate score configuration resolution for newly created unchampioned scores and align latest/version/no_cache behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Reconfirmed during the Information Accuracy realignment rollout on 2026-04-21. The MCP predict path for Agent Misrepresentation (Composite) with no_cache=true fails because the resolver rejects dependency scores that do not yet have championVersionId. The failing dependency set now includes High-Pressure Tactics, Copay Guarantees, Savings Promises, Ambiguous Cost Language, False Carrier Claims, False Local Pharmacy Claims, and False Service Claims.
